ORACLE
Start searching Open repository

Oracle Solution EngineeringGitHub Asset Discovery

We are a team of Oracle specialists focused on cloud and software solutions. Our mission is to help organizations solve business challenges and accelerate their journey to Oracle Cloud through expert guidance, hands-on workshops, solution architectures, code examples, health checks, and practical implementation advice.

As part of our work, we create a wide range of technical assets-from architecture patterns and deployment guides to automation scripts, demos, and reference implementations. We believe these resources should be open, accessible, and beneficial to the broader technology community.

This repository serves as a central place to share those assets. By making our work publicly available, we aim to provide customers, partners, developers, and architects with proven best practices, reusable solutions, and practical examples that can help them build, modernize, and innovate faster.

Transparency and collaboration are core to how we work. We not only share the tools and approaches we use internally at Oracle, but also welcome feedback, improvements, and contributions from the community. Together, we can continuously improve the quality of these resources and build a growing collection of open-source knowledge for everyone.

Use this page as a guided front door into the repository: start from a product area, search by outcome or technology, then open the most relevant GitHub asset when you are ready to go deeper.

The index covers folders and files across the full hierarchy, helping field teams, architects, developers, and partners quickly locate README guides, PDFs, Terraform assets, scripts, notebooks, reference designs, and deployment examples.

Product Areas

AI
AI Data Strategy Align trusted data, governance, and cloud platforms to turn AI initiatives into repeatable business outcomes.
Gen AI Platform Build generative AI services, agents, RAG patterns, and application experiences on Oracle's AI platform.
OCI
Tech for Enterprise Use OCI foundations for enterprise workloads across compute, storage, networking, security, and landing zones.
Cloud Native Design modern applications with containers, Kubernetes, automation, observability, and scalable cloud native patterns.
Database Platform
Multicloud Run Oracle Database services across Oracle Cloud and leading hyperscalers with consistent performance and choice.
Building Apps with Oracle Database Create data-driven applications using Oracle Database capabilities for development, integration, analytics, and AI.
Sovereign Cloud
Sovereign Cloud Support regulated and national-critical workloads with cloud infrastructure focused on residency, control, and trust.
